name: Baked Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, lightly beat the egg.
2. Add milk, sugar, vanilla and salt to the beaten egg.
3. Pour mixture into two ungreased 6-oz custard cups.
4. Sprinkle each cup with nutmeg.
5. Set the cups in a pan containing 1/2 to 1 inch of hot water.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until set.
